description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU CI that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, on a nightly schedule, and on manual dispatch. The workflow builds and tests FBGEMM_GPU-CPU on various CPU hosts with different architectures, compilers, and Python versions, and uploads the built wheel as a GitHub Actions artifact. A second job downloads the artifact, tests it on GPU, and pushes it to PyPI if specified.
